name: AirVape Legacy Pro
summary: A pure-convection portable vaporiser with a removable 18650 battery, for patients who prioritise flavour and serviceability.
description: The AirVape Legacy Pro uses pure convection heating for clean, flavourful vapour, with full temperature control from 93C to 227C and a 15-second heat-up. It handles dry herb and concentrates, and includes a gold-plated basket for microdosing. The removable 18650 battery means you can swap in a fresh cell rather than wait to recharge, and it supports wireless charging. The body is made from hemp-based materials and non-animal leather, and it's backed by a limited lifetime warranty. Suits patients who want convection flavour and the long-term value of a serviceable, replaceable-battery device.
